mapper.select:
SELECT id ,name ,type,sort,data FROM iet i
i.id = #{iet}

SELECT id,pid,iet,money,data FROM ice_info ii
ii.pid = #{id}

SELECT id, pid, type, source, time, money FROM ice_bill ib
ib.pid = #{id}

SELECT i.id, f.name AS frame, c.name AS customer, i.`time`, i.number, i.total, i.actual, i.money, -- COALESCE(ib.billed_sum, 0.00) AS writeOffAmount, a.name AS account, p.name AS people, i.`file`, i.data, i.more, i.examine, i.nucleus, u.name AS `user` FROM ice i LEFT JOIN frame f ON i.frame = f.id LEFT JOIN customer c ON i.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN account a ON i.account = a.id LEFT JOIN people p ON i.people = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON i.user = u.id -- LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pid, SUM(money) AS billed_sum FROM ice_bill GROUP BY pid) AS ib ON i.id = ib.pid
i.id = #{id}

SELECT i.id, f.name AS frame, c.name AS customer, i.`time`, i.number, i.total, i.actual, i.money, COALESCE(ib.billed_sum, 0.00) AS writeOffAmount, a.name AS account, p.name AS people, i.`file`, i.data, i.more, i.examine, i.nucleus, u.name AS `user` FROM ice i LEFT JOIN frame f ON i.frame = f.id LEFT JOIN customer c ON i.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN account a ON i.account = a.id LEFT JOIN people p ON i.people = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON i.user = u.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT pid, SUM(money) AS billed_sum FROM ice_bill GROUP BY pid) AS ib ON i.id = ib.pid
AND i.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.id}, '%')
AND i.frame LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.frame}, '%')
AND i.customer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.customer}, '%')
AND i.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.number}, '%')
AND i.`time` >= #{query.startDate}
AND i.`time` <= #{query.endDate}
AND i.account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.account}, '%')
AND i.people LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.people}, '%')
AND i.user LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.user}, '%')
AND i.examine = #{query.examine}
AND i.nucleus = #{query.nucleus}
AND i.data LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.data}, '%')
ORDER BY i.`time` DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zo_psi.ice (id, frame, customer, `time`, `number`, total, actual, money, account, people, `file`, `data`, more, examine, nucleus, `user`) VALUES (#{id}, #{frame}, #{customer}, #{time}, #{number}, #{total}, #{actual}, #{money}, #{account}, #{people}, #{file}, #{data}, #{more}, #{examine}, #{nucleus}, #{user})

INSERT INTO zo_psi.ice_bill (id, pid, `type`, source, `time`, money) VALUES
(#{bill.id}, #{bill.pid}, #{bill.type}, #{bill.source}, #{bill.time}, #{bill.money})

INSERT INTO ice_info (id, pid, iet, money, `data`) VALUES
(#{info.id}, #{info.pid}, #{info.iet}, #{info.money}, #{info.data})
